---
title: "shrunk_covariance"
generated: true
description: "Analytic-shrinkage covariance, returning the covariance only."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.connectivity`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:shrunk_covariance -->
```python
shrunk_covariance(X: Float[Array, 'n p'], *, method: ShrinkageMethod = 'ledoit_wolf', assume_centered: bool = False) -> Float[Array, 'p p']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:shrunk_covariance -->
Analytic-shrinkage covariance, returning the covariance only.

Thin wrapper over [`ledoit_wolf`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity/ledoit_wolf.qmd) and [`oas`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity/oas.qmd) that returns just the
shrunk covariance, discarding the shrinkage intensity.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:shrunk_covariance -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Float` | `n` × `p` | — | Data matrix of `n` observations by `p` features. |
| `method` | `ShrinkageMethod` | — | `'ledoit_wolf'` | Which analytic-shrinkage estimator to use. `'ledoit_wolf'` (the default) is a common connectome default; `'oas'` selects the oracle-approximating-shrinkage intensity. |
| `assume_centered` | `bool` | — | `False` | If `True`, treat `X` as already mean-centred; otherwise centre each feature before estimating the covariance. Default `False`. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `p` × `p`. The shrunk covariance matrix.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:shrunk_covariance -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
